zh.Stopham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne    Atte Ford於1300年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆時，她的父親William Atte Ford5歲，母親Juliana de Sanderstead26歲。她於大約1333年與William de Stopham III在英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanne    Atte Ford于1300年出生在英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆时，她的父亲William Atte Ford5岁，母亲Juliana de Sanderstead26岁。她于大约1333年与William de Stopham III在英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Forth
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Forde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan, Dermot, Aine, Fionnuala, Liam, Nuala.
English and Irish: variant of   Ford   1 and 2. This is a very common spelling in Ireland.
Norwegian (Førde): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Førde (there are eleven on the west coast), from Old Norse fyrthi, dative of fjǫrthr ‘fjord’.

variants.name: Foran
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fuartháin ‘descendant of Fuarthán’, a personal name derived from fuar ‘cold’. The word fuarán also means ‘spring’ or ‘pool’. The form Fuarthán was understood as fuarathán ‘cold little ford’, and the name has thus sometimes been translated into English as Ford .

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

nameMeanings.name: Atte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which was derived in the medieval period from the Old English personal name Tāta.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne    Atte Ford was born in 1300, in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Atte Ford, was 5 and her mother, Juliana de Sanderstead, was 26. She married William de Stopham III about 1333, in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1375, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanne    Atte Ford est née en 1300, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Atte Ford, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Sanderstead, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William de Stopham III environ 1333, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanne    Atte Ford 1300 in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Atte Ford 5 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Sanderstead 26. Sie hat um 1333 in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom William de Stopham III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne    Atte Ford è nata il nel 1300 nel Stopham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Atte Ford, aveva 5 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Sanderstead, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William de Stopham III circa 1333, nel Stopham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1375, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne    Atte Fordが1300年にイギリスイギリススセックスストファムで生まれた時，父William Atte Fordは5歳，母Juliana de Sandersteadは26歳であった。約1333年にイギリスイギリススセックスストファムでWilliam de Stopham IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne    Atte Ford(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스토프아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Atte Ford(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Sanderstead(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스토프아에서 William de Stopham III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanne    Atte Ford nasceu em 1300, em Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Atte Ford, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Sanderstead, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Stopham III aproximadamente 1333, em Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1375, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne    Atte Ford родилась в 1300 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Atte Ford было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Sanderstead, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Stopham III около 1333 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanne    Atte Ford nació en 1300, en Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Atte Ford, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Juliana de Sanderstead, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William de Stopham III aproximadamente 1333, en Stopham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1375, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
